item.title: Airflow
item.author: seilylook
item.description: Why Airflow Organization Apache Airflow helps you: Set the order of your tasks Make sure each task starts only when the provious ones are done Control the timing of your entire data process ex) You need to collect data from a database, clean it, perform some calculations, and then generate a report. Airflow helps you define this sequence and makes sure each step happens in the correct order, even if some tasks take loger than others
